title: TTRP Rank Icons
description: This changes the long obtrusive ranks that TallTalesRP has into neat little icons!
body:
## This is an <u>unofficial</u> addition to the [TallTalesRP Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/talltalesrp)!
Requires the [TallTalesRP Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/talltalesrp) to function!
This resource pack has [DynamicPack](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamicpack) support!

**In order to overwrite the existing textures on TallTalesRP, you need to install [Server Pack Unlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker) and move this pack above the Server Resource Pack.**

Due to the fact that the current server ranks are quite long and take up a large portion of the displayed player list, as well as making names hard to read in tight spaces, I created this pack to change all the server ranks into handly little icons as a way to fix those issues!

### Here's what the icons look like so far!
Original Server Ranks on left, Rank Icons in middle, and Compressed Ranks on right:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![All Rank Icons](https://i.imgur.com/8oVyPie.png)

</details>

If you need to contact me about bugs with this pack, or want to request a change to this pack, you can ping me with inquiries on the [TallTalesRP Discord](https://discord.gg/talltalesrp)!
